category_sources: source_facts.description says passt provides user-mode networking daemons for virtual machines and namespaces.
source_facts.homepage points to the official passt about page.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title/path is the passt project about page.
docs_sources: Official passt about page is the best official documentation surface available from source_facts.homepage.
repo_sources: Official source_facts.homepage is hosted at passt.top/passt and the source archive is from the same official passt.top project path.
tags_sources: source_facts.description provides networking, virtual machine, namespace, and daemon context.
source_facts.executables lists passt, pasta, pesto, and related command-line tools.
